backstory.original: Miria Elithren is a Shadar Kai Silvanesti Elf from the world of Krynn. Born under an ill-omen of the Dark Moon, Nuitari, she had an unhappy childhood that caused her to flee her homeland and seek tutelage in advanced magical arts beyond Elven lands. After passing the Test of High Sorcery, she briefly allied with Lord Soth until he tried to turn Miria into an undead creature subservient to his will. Miria escaped Soth's trap at the cost of the flesh and muscle of her right arm. Pursued by Soth for her arcane knowledge, Miria seeks to escape Krynn.
backstory.display: 米莉雅·艾利森是来自克莱恩世界的影灵西瓦那斯提精灵。她出生在不祥的暗月努塔瑞之下，不幸的童年导致她逃离家园，走出精灵国度，寻求高级魔法艺术的指教。通过高等魔法测试后，她曾与索斯领主短暂结盟，直到他试图将米莉雅转化为服从自身意志的亡灵生物。以右臂的血肉为代价，米莉雅逃离了索斯的陷阱。然而为了她的奥术学识，索斯紧追不舍，米莉雅因此试图逃离克莱恩。

description.original: Miria fires an energy ray at the nearest enemy, dealing one hit of damage, and reducing its damage by 50% for 6 seconds. Does not stack.
description.display: 米莉雅向最近的敌人发射能量射线，造成一次伤害，并在 6 秒内使其伤害降低 50%。不可堆叠。

description.original: Miria summons skeletons to fight for her. All enemies are slowed due to the confusion on the battlefield.
description.display: 米莉雅召唤骷髅为她战斗。由于战场的混乱，所有敌人均被减速。

longDescription.original: Miria summons 5 skeletons to the battlefield. The skeletons deal 15 attacks to the enemies before vanishing. All enemies are slowed by 50% for the duration due to the confusion on the battlefield.
longDescription.display: 米莉雅召唤 5 具骷髅出现在战场上。骷髅消失前，会对敌人发动 15 次攻击。在此期间，由于战场的混乱，所有敌人均被减速 50%。

description.original: Miria traps the souls of defeated enemies, increasing the buff of her support abilities based on how far the Champions have progressed.
description.display: 米莉雅将战败敌人的灵魂困住，并根据勇士们的进展程度增益她的支持技能。

description.original: Miria protects the formation by summoning Zombie bodyguards to protect champions in the front column.
description.display: 米莉雅召唤僵尸保镖保护前列勇士，从而保护阵型。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all adjacent Champions by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使所有相邻勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

tipText.original: Miria increases the damage of Champions adjacent to her, keep her next to your highest damage dealing champions.
tipText.display: 米莉雅使与她相邻的勇士伤害提高，将她放置在伤害最高的勇士身边。

description.desc: While $(source_hero) is alive, a Zombie Bodyguard that shares hit points with $(source_hero) appears in front of each Champion in the front-most column of the formation. When a Champion in that column takes damage, the Zombie Bodyguard takes $(amount)% of the damage instead, while the original target takes the remaining $(miria_zombie_bodyguards_remaining_amount)%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: A Zombie Bodyguard defends $target by redirecting $amount% of incoming damage to $(source_hero) instead

description.desc: 当$(source_hero)存活时，阵型最前列的每个勇士面前出行一名与$(source_hero)共享生命值的僵尸保镖。当该列中的一名勇士受到伤害时，僵尸保镖代其承受 $(amount)% 的伤害，而原目标则承受剩余的 $(miria_zombie_bodyguards_remaining_amount)%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 僵尸保镖将受到的 $amount% 伤害转移给$(source_hero)，从而保护$target

tipText.original: Miria protects the formation by summoning Zombie Bodyguards to protect the frontmost Champions. She does not need to be in the front column to be effective.
tipText.display: 米莉雅召唤僵尸保镖保护最前列勇士，从而保护阵型。她不需要位于前列也能生效。

description.desc: When an enemy is defeated, $(source_hero) can capture its soul and gain a Soul Cage stack. Her maximum number of Soul Cage stacks is $(num_stacks___2) for every $(num_areas___2) areas completed in the current adventure, rounded up. $(source_hero) increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Soul Cage stack she has, stacking multiplicatively.
当敌人被击败时，$(source_hero)可以捕获其灵魂并获得一层灵魂囚笼堆叠。她在当前冒险中完每完成 $(num_areas___2) 个区域，“灵魂囚笼”的最大堆叠层为 $(num_stacks___2) 层，四舍五入。每层灵魂囚笼堆叠均使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$(source_hero) increases the attack bonus of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% for each Lawful Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位守序阵营的勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id___2)攻击加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Miria prefers those who follow the rules.
specializationDescription.display: 米莉雅喜欢遵守规则的人。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the attack bonus of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% for each Champion with an INT score of 15+ in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位智力达到 15+ 的勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id___2)攻击加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$(source_hero) increases the attack bonus of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% for each Unaffiliated Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位无从属组织勇士，即使$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id___2)攻击加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

$(source_hero) maintains a stash of clones in her Inner Sanctum with a count equal to her Soul Cage stacks. If $(source_hero) is defeated, a clone immediately appears and takes her place at full health. This does not reduce the number of Soul Cage stacks she has. Her stash of clones are regenerated when the party changes areas. For each clone summoned in the current area, the effect of $(upgrade_name id) is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.

$(source_hero)在她的内心圣所中保存着一堆复制体，数量相当于她的灵魂囚笼堆叠层数。如果$(source_hero)被击败，一名复制体会立即出现，并以生命值全满的状态取代她的位置。这不会减少她的灵魂囚笼堆叠层数。当探险队改变区域时，她的复制体存量将刷新。在当前区域中每召唤一名复制体，$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$(source_hero) increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of her max health for each Soul Cage stack she has, stacking additively.
每层灵魂囚笼均使$(source_hero)提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于她的最大生命值的 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

description.original: Why not let the minions take care of it?
description.display: 为什么不让仆从来解决呢？

description.original: If you learn something from my tutelage, you may not die so young.
description.display: 如果你从我的指教中受益，可能就不会英年早逝了。

description.original: I've seen the worst this realm has to offer. You are nothing to me.
description.display: 我见过这个世界最糟糕的一面。对我来说你们根本不值一提。

description.original: My arm isn't an issue. I can still grab your throat with it.
description.display: 我的手臂不成问题。我依然可以用它掐住你的喉咙。

description.original: I trained for years to wear these robes.
description.display: 为了穿上这些法袍，我接受过多年的训练。

description.original: The tests... are not for the faint of heart...
description.display: 那些测试--不适合软弱之人......

description.original: Yes, I did work for him, until it no longer benefitted me.
description.display: 没错，我曾是他的手下，直到于我有害无益。

description.original: Oh, this green glow? It's nothing. Merely a trinket.
description.display: 嗯？绿色的光芒？不用在意。只是一件小饰品。
它们的力量在我身上流淌。

description.original: I learnt a great deal from him, but I still value my promises.
description.display: 我从他身上学到了很多，但我依然坚守承诺。

description.original: If you'll excuse me, you're in my way, and I have to do something about that!
description.display: 不好意思，你们挡路了，我要去做事情了！

effects.description: Miria also counts as a Tiefling

description.original: You have no idea how much suffering a body can take.
description.display: 你根本不知道人的身体能承受多大的痛苦。

description.original: Be a good minion and obey.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Miria Elithren is a Shadar Kai Silvanesti Elf from the world of Krynn. Born under an ill-omen of the Dark Moon, Nuitari, she had an unhappy childhood that caused her to flee her homeland and seek tutelage in advanced magical arts beyond Elven lands. After passing the Test of High Sorcery, she briefly allied with Lord Soth until he tried to turn Miria into an undead creature subservient to his will. Miria escaped Soth's trap at the cost of the flesh and muscle of her right arm. Pursued by Soth for her arcane knowledge, Miria seeks to escape Krynn.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Miria is a tanking and support Champion that protects the champions with her undead servants.

event_upgrades.name: Zombie Bodyguards
event_upgrades.description: Miria protects the formation by summoning Zombie bodyguards to protect champions in the front column.

event_upgrades.name: Soul Cage
event_upgrades.description: Miria traps the souls of defeated enemies, increasing the buff of her support abilities based on how far the Champions have progressed.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 米莉雅·艾利森是来自克莱恩世界的影灵西瓦那斯提精灵。她出生在不祥的暗月努塔瑞之下，不幸的童年导致她逃离家园，走出精灵国度，寻求高级魔法艺术的指教。通过高等魔法测试后，她曾与索斯领主短暂结盟，直到他试图将米莉雅转化为服从自身意志的亡灵生物。以右臂的血肉为代价，米莉雅逃离了索斯的陷阱。然而为了她的奥术学识，索斯紧追不舍，米莉雅因此试图逃离克莱恩。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 米莉雅是一名坦克和支援型勇士，可以使用亡灵仆从保护勇士。

event_upgrades.name: 僵尸保镖
event_upgrades.description: 米莉雅召唤僵尸保镖保护前列勇士，从而保护阵型。

event_upgrades.description: 米莉雅将战败敌人的灵魂困住，并根据勇士们的进展程度增益她的支持技能。

original.name: Adept of the Black Robes

display.name: 黑玫瑰高手
display.description: 为了穿上这些法袍，我接受过多年的训练。

original.name: Test of High Sorcery

display.name: 高魔测试
display.description: 那些测试--不适合软弱之人......

original.name: Soth's Right Hand
original.description: Yes, I did work for him, until it no longer benefitted me.

display.name: 索斯的左膀右臂
display.description: 没错，我曾是他的手下，直到于我有害无益。

original.name: Soul Flame

display.name: 灵魂烈焰

display.name: 笼中梦
display.description: 它们的力量在我身上流淌。

original.name: The Black Rose's Influence
original.description: I learnt a great deal from him, but I still value my promises.

display.name: 黑玫瑰的影响力
display.description: 我从他身上学到了很多，但我依然坚守承诺。
